textPlain: This is going to be awesome! Thank you a lot for your interest, and I hope to see many of you there in November!Scryer Prolog is a modern ISO Prolog system written in Rust with many interesting features.Try the latest version from https://github.com/mthom/scryer-prologThe yearly meetups are excellent opportunities to learn more  about the latest developments of Prolog systems and the standard. Several companies have already confirmed their attendance, yielding also interesting business opportunities.Many thanks to Prof. Christian Jendreiko for generously hosting the meetup at the Hochschule Düsseldorf again this year, and to everyone contributing to such a great lineup of interesting talks!
